svg.aria-label: William Zujkowski's GitHub profile terminal — security engineer, multi-agent AI builder (nexus-agents), basement-datacenter homelabber in southern PA, and dad-joke connoisseur. A playful animated terminal session: a global install, a live GitHub language breakdown, a little exercise animation, and a rotating dad joke. The theme rotates daily.
svg.title: William Zujkowski's GitHub profile terminal — security engineer, multi-agent AI builder (nexus-agents), basement-datacenter homelabber in southern PA, and dad-joke connoisseur. A playful animated terminal session: a global install, a live GitHub language breakdown, a little exercise animation, and a rotating dad joke. The theme rotates daily.
svg.desc:
william@homelab:~$ neofetch --ascii_distro homelab william@homelab OS: DadOS LTS (Linux + Coffee) Shell: /bin/dad-jokes Uptime: 20+ years (one continuous session) Role: Security Engineer • Multi-Agent AI • Homelabber Location: southern PA — basement datacenter Languages: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust Editor: nvim (btw)
● ● ● ● ● ● ● ● william@homelab:~$ npm install -g good-vibes added 847 packages in 42.0s
Dependencies resolved: @williamzujkowski/good-vibes@1.0.0 is-string@1.0.0 is-object@1.0.0 is-thing@1.0.0 is-anything@1.0.0 universe@∞ string-utils@1.0.0 ... 842 more packages ⚠ 3 vulnerabilities (1 moderate, 2 high) Run `npm audit fix` to fix them
Package size: 2.3 MB for a function that pads strings Worth it? Absolutely not. Did we do it anyway? Yes. william@homelab:~$ gh lang --top 6 Python ███████░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 36% TypeScript ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 31% Shell ██░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 9% JavaScript █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 7% HTML █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 5% Go █░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 4% william@homelab:~$ exercise --dad \o/ | / \ william@homelab:~$ fortune | dad DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 30 Category: AI Q: Why did the LLM go to therapy? A: It had too many hallucinations!

g.text: Run `npm audit fix` to fix them
Package size: 2.3 MB for a function that pads strings
║ DAD JOKE OF THE DAY - May 30 ║
║ Q: Why did the LLM go to therapy? ║
║ A: It had too many hallucinations! ║
